---
title: "OpenDomain in Network Processor"
description: "Apply all OpenDomainStrategy variants in NetworkGeometryProcessor with polygon reference coverage"
author: "Karel Dieussaert"
date: "2026-03-31"
categories: [OpenDomainStrategy, NetworkGeometryProcessor, Process]
format:
  html:
    code-fold: false
jupyter: python3
---
# OpenDomain in NetworkGeometryProcessor
This example shows how `OpenDomainStrategy` behaves in [NetworkGeometryProcessor](../reference/NetworkGeometryProcessor.qmd) when the reference dataset contains polygon coverage.

## What you learn
1. How to loop over all `OpenDomainStrategy` values.
2. How to run the same input against each strategy.
3. How to compare result type, emptiness and length.

```{python}
{{< include ../../examples/example_opendomain_network_polygon_reference.py >}}
```
